html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

“Mutates some creatures and plants into their lunar mutated form.”

-

The Lunar Experiment is a feature exclusive to the Hallowed Nights event in Don't Starve Together. It can be conducted at the Mad Scientist Lab, using a Moon Moth Wing and a Lune Tree Blossom, and depleting 10 for the player. The experiment has a 50% chance to result in only one potion, a 30% to result in two potions and a 20% to result in three potions.

The experiment will result in a Steeped Lunar Essence that can be used to change items and mobs into their Lunar counterparts eg. Butterfly into Moon Moth.

Multiple potions are produced when crafting. There is chance 50% to craft 2 of them, 30% to craft 3 and 20% to craft 4.

Transformations

(note: this changes Light Flower that gives Light Bulb upon harvesting into the Light Flower that spawns Bulbous Light Bug)

/////

//// /

Tips

  • Because it has a chance to give multiple potions, it can be used to multiply Lune Trees by planting 6 flowers, releasing a bee to propagate those flowers, turning the flowers into Lune Trees, chopping those trees for blossoms, and killing the spawned moths for wings.
  • Note also that flowers spawn butterflies, which can be turned into moths, which can be captured and planted as lune trees.
  • It can be used on a flying bird to stun it, making it fall to the ground where it can be picked up.

Trivia

  • The Lunar Experiment was introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2019.

Gallery

  • Idle animation

–Wormwood
“I'm more of a coffee drinker, myself.”
–Winona
“A brew of switcheroo!”
–Wortox
“Look breakable...”
–Wurt
“What should we mutate first?”
–Walter
“It smells like shifting possibilities.”
–Wanda
“Mutates some creatures and plants into their lunar mutated form.”

The '''Lunar Experiment''' is a feature exclusive to the [[Hallowed Nights]] [[:Category:Events|event]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be conducted at the [[Hallowed Nights#Mad Scientist Lab|Mad Scientist Lab]], using a [[Moon Moth Wings|Moon Moth Wing]] and a [[Lune Tree Blossom]], and depleting 10 {{Sanity}} for the player. The experiment has a 50% chance to result in only one potion, a 30% to result in two potions and a 20% to result in three potions.

The experiment will result in a '''Steeped Lunar Essence''' that can be used to change items and mobs into their Lunar counterparts eg. [[Butterfly]] into [[Moon Moth]].

Multiple potions are produced when crafting. There is chance 50% to craft 2 of them, 30% to craft 3 and 20% to craft 4. 
__NOTOC__
== Transformations ==

{{pic|50|Butterfly}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Moon Moth}}

{{pic|50|Light Bulb}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Bulbous Lightbug}}

{{pic|50|Light Flower}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Light Flower}} (note: this changes Light Flower that gives Light Bulb upon harvesting into the Light Flower that spawns Bulbous Light Bug)

{{pic|50|Sapling Item|Sapling}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Sapling (Moon)|Lunar Sapling}}

{{pic|50|Flower}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Lune Tree Sapling|Lune Tree}}

{{pic|50|Carrot}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Carrat Item|Carrat}}

{{pic|50|Dragon Fruit}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Saladmander Ripe|Saladmander}}

{{pic|50|Spider|Spider/DST}}/{{pic|50|Spider Warrior}}/{{pic|50|Cave Spider}}/{{pic|50|Spitter}}/{{pic|50|Dangling Depth Dweller}}/{{pic|50|Nurse Spider}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Shattered Spider}}

{{pic|50|Hound|Hound/DST}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Horror Hound}}

{{pic|50|Pengull|Pengull/DST}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Permafrost Pengull}}

{{pic|50|Crow|Crow/DST}}/{{pic|50|Snowbird|Snowbird/DST}}/{{pic|50|Canary}}/{{pic|50|Redbird|Redbird/DST}}/{{pic|50|Puffin}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Moonblind Crow}}/ {{pic|50|Misshapen Bird}}

{{pic|50|Wobster (DST)|Wobster/DST}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Lunar Wobster}}

{{pic|50|Wobster Mound}} [[File:Interface arrow right.png|50px]] {{pic|50|Moon Glass Mound}}

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Because it has a chance to give multiple potions, it can be used to multiply Lune Trees by planting 6 flowers, releasing a bee to propagate those flowers, turning the flowers into Lune Trees, chopping those trees for blossoms, and killing the spawned moths for wings.
* Note also that flowers spawn butterflies, which can be turned into moths, which can be captured and planted as lune trees.
* It can be used on a flying bird to stun it, making it fall to the ground where it can be picked up.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Lunar Experiment was introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2019.
